name: Create a structured DOCX document from data
prompt: Create a Word document called report.docx containing a project status report. It must include: (1) A title 'Q1 Project Status Report' as a heading, (2) A paragraph with text 'Report generated for the Engineering department. Period: January - March 2026.', (3) A section heading 'Team Members', (4) A bullet list of 4 team members: Alice Chen (Lead), Bob Park (Backend), Carol Kim (Frontend), Dave Lee (QA), (5) A section heading 'Milestones', (6) A table with 3 columns (Milestone, Status, Date) and 4 data rows: (Design Complete, Done, 2026-01-15), (Backend API, Done, 2026-02-10), (Frontend UI, In Progress, 2026-03-01), (Testing, Planned, 2026-03-20). After creating the document, also extract its text content to report_text.txt (one way: use python-docx or pandoc to extract plain text).
